name: embedded_signing_link_get
description: Generate an embedded signing link to embed the signing experience directly in your application using an iframe.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document ID to generate a signing link for (query parameter).

parameters.name: signerEmail
parameters.description: Email address of the signer to generate the link for (query parameter).

parameters.name: redirectUrl
parameters.description: URL to redirect to after signing is complete.
